raw:
{
  "judge_id": "your-judge-id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.3": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The critique thoroughly identifies and explains the logical inconsistency in defining 'predictive skill' as inter-model agreement rather than a measure against observed or verifiable data.",
    "R1.3": "The critique correctly points out that the paper does not adequately link claims about precipitation change to supporting evidence from observations or hindcasts.",
    "RX.1": "While the critique highlights uncertainty in the model projections, it doesn't explicitly quantify confidence levels for each claim or identify missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "The critique focuses on the limitations of the chosen regions and scenarios, but doesn't delve into whether the analysis covers all aspects of the requested active set.",
    "RX.4": "The critique identifies potential harm in relying on the model projections without proper validation and acknowledges the exclusion of regions with known uncertainties.",
    "RX.5": "The critique lacks specific examples of how the sources are traced or integrated into the analysis."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The critique thoroughly identifies and explains the logical inconsistency in defining 'predictive skill' as inter-model agreement rather than a measure against observed or verifiable data.
rationale.R1.3: The critique correctly points out that the paper does not adequately link claims about precipitation change to supporting evidence from observations or hindcasts.
rationale.RX.1: While the critique highlights uncertainty in the model projections, it doesn't explicitly quantify confidence levels for each claim or identify missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The critique focuses on the limitations of the chosen regions and scenarios, but doesn't delve into whether the analysis covers all aspects of the requested active set.
rationale.RX.4: The critique identifies potential harm in relying on the model projections without proper validation and acknowledges the exclusion of regions with known uncertainties.
rationale.RX.5: The critique lacks specific examples of how the sources are traced or integrated into the analysis.
